Meet Dentists

Led by passion and years of clinical excellence, our doctors are committed to your smile's future.

Dr. Ronni Davidson

Lead Dentist

SpecialistGeneral Dentist

Dr. Davidson leads our surgical team with a focus on complex reconstruction and patient comfort. He combines precision technique with a calm, reassuring approach that puts even anxious patients at ease.

Certifications

D.M.D., Medical University of South Carolina

Advanced Training in Aesthetic Dentistry, Las Vegas Institute

Member, American Academy of Cosmetic Dentistry

Dr. Emily Tran

Orthodontist

SpecialistOrthodontics

Dr. Tran specializes in creating beautiful smiles through innovative orthodontic solutions. Her passion for aesthetics combined with a deep understanding of dental mechanics allows her to tailor treatments to individual needs.

Certifications

D.M.D., Harvard School of Dental Medicine

Certificate in Orthodontics, University of Illinois

Member, American Association of Orthodontists

Dr. Michael Torres

Periodontist

SpecialistPeriodontics

Dr. Torres is dedicated to helping patients maintain healthy gums and prevent periodontal disease. He employs the latest techniques in gum treatment and dental implants, ensuring optimal oral health for every patient.

Certifications

D.M.D., University of Pennsylvania

Advanced Training in Implantology, Misch International Implant Institute

Member, American Academy of Periodontology

Dr. Sarah Kim

Pediatric Dentist

SpecialistGeneral Dentist

Dr. Kim is passionate about making dental visits enjoyable for children. Her gentle approach and engaging methods help demystify dental care, ensuring that young patients leave with bright smiles and excited about their next visit.

Certifications

D.M.D., University of Southern California

Residency in Pediatric Dentistry, University of Michigan

Member, American Academy of Pediatric Dentistry

Dr. Alex Rivera

Oral Surgeon

SpecialistOral Surgery

Dr. Rivera specializes in surgical procedures that require precision and expertise. His commitment to patient safety and pain management makes him a trusted choice for complex oral surgeries.

Certifications

D.M.D., Tufts University School of Dental Medicine

Fellowship in Oral and Maxillofacial Surgery, American Association of Oral and Maxillofacial Surgeons

Member, American Dental Association

Dr. Olivia Chen

Prosthodontist

SpecialistProsthodontics

Dr. Chen focuses on restoring the functionality and aesthetics of patients' smiles through advanced prosthodontic techniques. Her artistic eye and attention to detail ensure that every restoration blends seamlessly with natural teeth.

Certifications

D.M.D., University of Florida

Certificate in Prosthodontics, New York University

Member, American College of Prosthodontists

Dr. Lisa Nguyen

Endodontist

SpecialistEndodontics

Dr. Nguyen focuses on preserving natural teeth through expert root canal treatments. Her meticulous approach and patient-centered care help alleviate fear and discomfort, allowing patients to maintain their smiles.

Certifications

D.M.D., Washington University in St. Louis

Certificate in Endodontics, University of Southern California

Member, American Association of Endodontists

Dr. Kevin Patel

Oral Pathologist

SpecialistOral Pathology

Dr. Patel is committed to diagnosing and treating diseases of the oral cavity. His expertise in oral pathology ensures that patients receive accurate diagnoses and effective treatment plans for complex oral health issues.

Certifications

D.M.D., University of North Carolina

Residency in Oral Pathology, University of California, San Francisco

Member, American Academy of Oral and Maxillofacial Pathology

Dr. Michael Torres

Periodontist

SpecialistPeriodontics

Dr. Torres is dedicated to helping patients maintain healthy gums and prevent periodontal disease. He employs the latest techniques in gum treatment and dental implants, ensuring optimal oral health for every patient.

Certifications

D.M.D., University of Pennsylvania

Advanced Training in Implantology, Misch International Implant Institute

Member, American Academy of Periodontology

Dr. Sophia Lee

Oral Radiologist

SpecialistOral Radiology

Dr. Lee specializes in the interpretation of dental imaging and the diagnosis of oral diseases through advanced radiographic techniques. Her expertise aids in the accurate detection of issues that may not be visible during a standard examination.

Certifications

D.M.D., University of Toronto

Certificate in Oral and Maxillofacial Radiology, University of Michigan

Member, American Academy of Oral and Maxillofacial Radiology

Dr. Emily Tran

Orthodontist

SpecialistOrthodontics

Dr. Tran specializes in creating beautiful smiles through innovative orthodontic solutions. Her passion for aesthetics combined with a deep understanding of dental mechanics allows her to tailor treatments to individual needs.

Certifications

D.M.D., Harvard School of Dental Medicine

Certificate in Orthodontics, University of Illinois

Member, American Association of Orthodontists

Dr. Michael Torres

Periodontist

SpecialistPeriodontics

Dr. Torres is dedicated to helping patients maintain healthy gums and prevent periodontal disease. He employs the latest techniques in gum treatment and dental implants, ensuring optimal oral health for every patient.

Certifications

D.M.D., University of Pennsylvania

Advanced Training in Implantology, Misch International Implant Institute

Member, American Academy of Periodontology
